title: Frontend Batch 32 - Public Detail Admin Action Failure Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public Blog and Work detail admin action shells so editor payload load failures render safe fallback panels and delete mutation failures sanitize technical backend/provider details.
behaviorBugsFound: Public Blog detail delete failures could show raw SQL, status, stack, and backend details.
Public Work detail delete failures could show raw provider, status, stack, and backend details.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs dynamic public detail admin action testing
validation.notes: Results were general/low-install Next.js/admin skills; no new skill was installed.
RED run failed with 2 raw technical delete failure assertions; load fallback tests passed.

remainingGaps: Safe return-to success behavior is covered by local guards in production but not yet directly asserted in component tests.
Browser session gate behavior for public admin affordances is still covered separately and can be revalidated in e2e once Docker/backend is available.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 33 - Public Detail Return-To Success Reinforcement.
